intro.title: Relationship Connection Tracker
intro.description: Track meaningful interactions, quality time, and connection habits that help your relationship grow.

checkin.title: Connection Check-In ❤️
checkin.subtitle: How did you connect with your partner today?
checkin.question: Did you deliberately connect with your partner today? *
checkin.description: Relationship connection includes any deliberate interaction or shared experience aimed at fostering closeness, trust, and intimacy.

activities.title: Your Connection Activities 🎯
activities.subtitle: Which connection activities did you practice today?

duration.title: Time Spent Connecting ⏱️
duration.subtitle: How long did you spend actively connecting? (optional)

noSelfCare.title: That's okay 💛
noSelfCare.subtitle: Let's understand what got in the way today.
noSelfCare.question2: What connection activity would have helped? (optional)

mood.title: How close do you feel? 🫧
mood.subtitle: Select your level of emotional closeness (optional)

review.title: Your Entry 📋
review.subtitle: Here's a summary of today's check-in

history.title: Weekly History 📅
history.subtitle: No entries in the last 7 days

positiveStatements.0: Investing in your connection is the heart of a strong relationship. ❤️
positiveStatements.1: A shared moment of care strengthens your bond. Well done. 🤝
positiveStatements.2: Every small connection check-in builds lasting emotional safety. 🌱
positiveStatements.3: You prioritized your partnership today. That matters. ✨
positiveStatements.4: Fostering intimacy today is the best thing you did for your couple. 🍃

supportiveStatements.0: It's okay. Tomorrow offers a new opportunity to reach out. Be gentle with yourselves. 🤍
supportiveStatements.1: Misalignments happen. It's the overall direction of care that matters. 🕊️
supportiveStatements.2: Even a small acknowledgment later today can bridge the gap. 💛
supportiveStatements.3: Resting separately is okay too. Give each other grace. 🌸
supportiveStatements.4: Noticing the disconnect is the first brave step toward reconnection. 🌷
